prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (compatible with the **CZSA 4.0L V8 TFSI** engine) with billet compressor wheel, 76mm inducer, and 106mm exducer, paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** for precise boost control up to 28 psi, supported by a **Forge Motorsport silicone charge pipe kit** with 4-ply reinforced hoses to eliminate boost leaks under extreme pressure

Full **APR Stage 3+ ECU/TCU software** recalibration for the **CZSA** engine, optimizing fueling via **Bosch Motorsport 1,000cc high-flow port injectors** and **AEM 320LPH in-tank fuel pump**, with a **custom-mapped methanol injection system (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit)** to suppress detonation at 600+ HP targets, while retaining OEM torque vectoring and quattro stability

Installation of a **Wagner Tuning Competition intercooler** (front-mount, 100% aluminum, 12-row core with 3.5" thick end tanks) and **034 Motorsport billet aluminum oil cooler** with **Mocal 19-row heat exchanger**, reducing IATs by 40°C under sustained WOT pulls, paired with a **Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU** for advanced knock control and individual cylinder tuning
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (SQ8-specific, carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended flares, custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser** with active aero flaps for downforce adjustment), finished in **Audi Nardo Grey with matte black accents** and **Vorsteiner V-FF107 22" forged wheels** (ET35, 10.5J front/12J rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (285/30 front, 325/25 rear)

**Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system** (full titanium construction, 100mm dual outlets, electronically controlled valves for backpressure optimization, and **custom X-pipe crossover** for enhanced V8 exhaust note tuning), paired with a **Milltek Sport resonated downpipe** to eliminate drone while maintaining aggressive tone

**OEM+ Audi Sport ABT carbon fiber exterior package** (front grille surround, mirror caps, and side skirts in exposed weave carbon), combined with a **custom 3M 1080 Satin Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and pillars, **LED laser headlights (Hella 5000K)** with **custom DRL delete**, and a **retrofitted RS7-style rear bumper with integrated tow hook cover**
